reviews.comment: It was an amazing atmosphere that we were provided with ... Best for few mins of peace ....

reviewReply.comment: Big cheers from our crew to you! We’re so happy you enjoyed the coffee and the vibes. Come by again anytime 💛

reviews.comment: One of the best cafes I have visited in a while. The coffee served is exceptional with unique brews. The Long Pour and Ibrik was a bliss. 10/10

reviewReply.comment: Hearing this from coffee lovers like you keeps us brewing our best every day. Hope to see you again soon at Coffee Island!
